items.title: Diagnostic Value of the Kappa Free Light Chain Index to Distinguish MOGAD, NMOSD, and MS.
items.abstract: The differential diagnosis between aquaporin-4-immunoglobulin G-positive neuromyelitis optica spectrum disorder (AQP4-NMOSD), myelin oligodendrocyte glycoprotein (MOG) antibody-associated disease (MOGAD), and multiple sclerosis (MS) can be complex. Kappa free light chain index (KFLC-Index) emerged as an effective biomarker for distinguishing patients with MS from patients with other conditions. The main aim of this study was to assess the diagnostic performance of KFLC-Index in differentiating MOGAD, AQP4-NMOSD, and MS and to compare it with CSF-restricted oligoclonal bands (OCB) performance. We conducted a retrospective case-control study involving 18 French centers through our national NOMADMUS database. Patients were eligible if they received MOGAD or AQP4-NMOSD diagnosis and if OCB status and KFLC-Index levels were available or could be measured retrospectively. As a comparator, we included a group of patients with MS from the Lyon center. We included 303 patients with 140 MOGAD, 37 AQP4-NMOSD, and 126 MS. The sex ratio F/M was 1/1 in the MOGAD group, 5/1 in the NMOSD group, and 4/1 in the MS group. The median age was 38 years in the MOGAD group, 52 in the NMOSD group, and 32 in the MS group. The median KFLC-Index (interquartile range) was the lowest in the MOGAD group (0.60 [0.33-2.09]) with 71% of undetectable CSF-KFLC, intermediate in the NMOSD group (8.85 [3.04-16.78]), and the highest in the MS group (49.90 [16.31-113.39]). KFLC-Index had very good diagnostic performance in differentiating MOGAD from MS (area under the curve [AUC] 0.93, 95% CI 0.9-0.96) with an optimal threshold of 5.7 (95% CI 4.74-6.85), a sensitivity of 0.89 (0.83-0.94), and a specificity of 0.89 (0.83-0.94). KFLC-Index had good performance in differentiating NMOSD from MS (AUC 0.82, 95% CI 0.74-0.88) and MOGAD from NMOSD (AUC 0.77, 95% CI 0.69-0.86). KFLC-Index did not significantly outperformed OCB in separating MOGAD from MS and NMOSD from MS; however, the combination of the 2 tests was more performant than used separately. KFLC-Index is a valuable tool in distinguishing MS from AQP4-NMOSD and MOGAD and provides additional information to that given by OCB. We suggest that KFLC-Index as an additional supporting criterion for the differential diagnosis between MOGAD and MS.
items.summary_ja: 背景：アクアポリン-4抗体陽性視神経脊髄炎スペクトラム障害（AQP4-NMOSD）、ミエリンオリゴデンドロサイト糖タンパク抗体関連疾患（MOGAD）、多発性硬化症（MS）の鑑別は困難である。方法：フランスの18施設からなるNOMADMUSデータベースを用いた後ろ向き症例対照研究で、MOGAD、AQP4-NMOSD、MS患者計303名（MOGAD 140、AQP4-NMOSD 37、MS 126）を対象に、脳脊髄液中のカッパ自由軽鎖指数（KFLC-Index）と制限性オリゴクローナルバンド（OCB）の診断性能を比較した。結果：KFLC-Indexの中央値はMOGAD群で最も低く（0.60）、NMOSD群で中間（8.85）、MS群で最も高かった（49.90）。MOGADとMSの鑑別においてKFLC-IndexはAUC 0.93、感度89％、特異度89％と高い診断性能を示した。NMOSDとMS、MOGADとNMOSDの鑑別でも良好な性能を示したが、OCB単独と比較して有意な優位性はなかった。ただし、KFLC-IndexとOCBの併用は単独より優れていた。結論：KFLC-IndexはMSとAQP4-NMOSDおよびMOGADの鑑別に有用であり、OCBと併用することで診断精度が向上するため、MOGADとMSの鑑別の補助的指標として推奨される。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、MOG抗体関連疾患（MOGAD）、AQP4抗体陽性視神経脊髄炎スペクトラム障害（AQP4-NMOSD）、多発性硬化症（MS）の鑑別におけるカッパ自由軽鎖指数（KFLC-Index）の診断価値を検討した。303例を対象に解析し、KFLC-IndexはMSとMOGADの鑑別に高い精度（AUC 0.93）を示し、NMOSDとの鑑別にも有用であった。OCB検査との併用で診断能が向上し、KFLC-Indexは鑑別診断の補助的指標として有望である。

items.title: Risk of Alzheimer Dementia After High-Dose vs Standard-Dose Influenza Vaccination.
items.abstract: Previous studies, including large cohort analyses comparing vaccinated and unvaccinated adults, suggest that routine immunizations such as inactivated influenza vaccines (IIVs) may reduce Alzheimer dementia (AD) risk. Whether AD risk differs after high-dose IIV (H-IIV) vs standard-dose IIV (S-IIV) remains unexamined. We hypothesized that AD risk would be lower among adults ≥65 years after H-IIV compared with S-IIV. This retrospective cohort study analyzed data spanning 2014-2019 from IQVIA PharMetrics Plus for Academics, a US health care claims database. Eligible participants were ≥65 years with ≥2 years of continuous medical and pharmaceutical coverage and no previous diagnostic or pharmacotherapeutic indicators of cognitive impairment. Vaccinations were identified by name and Current Procedural Terminology codes. Participants were followed for up to 3 years postvaccination. Incident AD was defined using International Classification of Diseases codes and AD medication dispenses (anticholinesterase inhibitors, memantine). We emulated a target trial using sequential nested trials to align eligibility, treatment assignment, and time-zero with vaccination dates, preventing immortal time bias. Inverse probability weighting adjusted for measured confounding, emulated randomization, and mitigated selection bias. Effects were estimated as risk difference, number needed to treat (NNT), risk ratio; 95% CIs were obtained via bootstrapping. Secondary analyses examined potential effect modifiers such as sex. The H-IIV group included 120,775 unique participants (185,183 person-trials; mean age 74.4 years, SD 5.5; 57.3% female), and the S-IIV group included 44,022 participants (53,918 person-trials; mean age 73.0, SD 6.1; 56.4% female). H-IIV was associated with significantly lower AD risk during months 1-25 postvaccination (minimum NNT = 185.2 at 25 months). After sex stratification, risk reduction persisted longer among women (months 1-13, minimum NNT = 416.7) than men (months 17-24, significant only in intention-to-treat analysis, minimum NNT = 232.6). High-dose influenza vaccination is associated with reduced AD risk compared with standard-dose vaccination in adults ≥65 years, with a stronger effect among women. Significant study limitations included duration of follow-up (≤3 years) and lack of sociodemographic, lifestyle, biomarker, and mortality data. Further research is needed to clarify whether the observed difference reflects protection against influenza infection or non-infection-related mechanisms. This study provides Class II evidence that treatment with H-IIV vs S-IIV was associated with decreased incident dementia in individuals ≥65 years of age captured in this US health care claims database.
items.summary_ja:
背景：従来の研究では、不活化インフルエンザワクチン（IIV）がアルツハイマー型認知症（AD）リスクを低減する可能性が示唆されているが、高用量（H-IIV）と標準用量（S-IIV）でのリスク差は未検証であった。  
方法：2014～2019年の米国医療請求データベースを用い、65歳以上で認知機能障害の既往がない参加者を対象に後ろ向きコホート研究を実施。H-IIV群（12万名超）とS-IIV群（4万名超）に分け、最大3年間追跡。AD発症は診断コードと薬剤投与情報で判定。交絡因子調整に逆確率重み付けを用い、性別による効果修飾も検討した。  
結果：H-IIV接種者は接種後1～25か月間にわたりADリスクが有意に低下（最小NNT=185.2）。性別解析では女性で効果がより長期間持続（1～13か月、最小NNT=416.7）、男性では17～24か月に限定的に認められた。  
結論：65歳以上の高齢者において、高用量インフルエンザワクチン接種は標準用量と比較しAD発症リスクを低減し、特に女性で効果が強いことが示された。ただし、追跡期間の短さや生活習慣情報欠如などの制約があり、今後は感染防御以外のメカニズムの解明が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 65歳以上の高齢者を対象に、高用量インフルエンザワクチン（H-IIV）と標準用量ワクチン（S-IIV）接種後のアルツハイマー型認知症（AD）発症リスクを比較した後ろ向きコホート研究。H-IIV接種群はS-IIV群に比べ、接種後1～25か月間にわたりADリスクが有意に低下し、特に女性で効果が強かった。追跡期間は最大3年で、社会経済的要因などの調整は不十分。さらなる検証が必要とされるが、高用量ワクチン接種はAD予防に有望な可能性を示した。

items.title: Genetic Etiologies of Epilepsies With Status Epilepticus: Insights From the Italian Pediatric Status Epilepticus Group Cohort.
items.abstract: Genetic factors are major contributors to pediatric epilepsy, but their role in status epilepticus (SE) remains incompletely defined. We aimed to characterize the clinical and genetic landscape of pediatric epilepsy complicated by SE in a large cohort, and to identify clinical features associated with genetic etiologies. We conducted a retrospective, multicenter, exploratory cohort study by selecting patients aged 1 month-18 years who experienced SE from the Italian Pediatric Status Epilepticus (IPSE) group database (2010-2022). SE and epilepsy syndromes were defined according to International League Against Epilepsy criteria. From the IPSE dataset, we included only patients with epilepsy whose etiology was classified as genetic (confirmed or presumed) or nongenetic (lesional, autoimmune, metabolic-acquired, infectious, or unknown). Clinical data were collected using standardized electronic case report forms. Of 1,071 children in the IPSE cohort, 790 with SE and epilepsy were included (median age at SE onset 3.9 years, interquartile range 1.3-8.1; 44% female). A genetic etiology was confirmed or presumed in 519 (66%). Compared with those with nongenetic etiologies (n = 271), patients with genetic epilepsies presented with SE at a younger age (median 3.4 vs 4.8 years, q = 0.003) and more often had epilepsy with both focal and generalized seizures (31% vs 13%,  In this large real-world cohort, two-thirds of children with epilepsy and SE had a genetic etiology, most commonly channelopathies. Younger age at SE and epilepsy with both focal and generalized seizure were linked to genetic causes. Despite limitations in testing strategies and retrospective design, these findings highlight the importance of systematic genetic investigation in pediatric epilepsies presenting SE.
items.summary_ja:
背景：小児てんかんにおける遺伝的要因は重要であるが、てんかん重積状態（SE）における役割は十分に解明されていない。  
方法：イタリア小児てんかん重積状態グループ（IPSE）のデータベース（2010-2022年）から、1か月～18歳のSEを経験したてんかん患者790例を後ろ向き多施設コホート研究として解析した。てんかん症候群は国際抗てんかん連盟基準に準拠し、遺伝性（確定または推定）と非遺伝性（病変性、自己免疫、代謝性、感染性、原因不明）に分類した。  
結果：対象の66％（519例）が遺伝性てんかんと判定された。遺伝性群は非遺伝性群（271例）に比べてSE発症年齢が若く（中央値3.4歳 vs 4.8歳、p=0.003）、焦点性と全般性の両方の発作を呈する割合が高かった（31％ vs 13％）。チャネル病が最も多かった。  
結論：小児てんかん重積状態の約3分の2は遺伝的要因が関与しており、若年発症や多様な発作型が遺伝性を示唆する。検査方法や研究デザインの制約はあるものの、SEを伴う小児てんかんでは系統的な遺伝子検査の重要性が示された。
items.summary_short_ja: イタリア小児てんかん重積症グループの大規模コホート研究で、てんかんと重積状態（SE）を呈した790例のうち66％が遺伝性てんかんと判明した。遺伝性群は非遺伝性群よりもSE発症年齢が若く、焦点性と全般性発作の併存が多かった。主にチャネル病が多く、遺伝子検査の体系的実施が小児てんかんSEの診断に重要であることが示された。

items.title: Staged Bilateral Magnetic Resonance-Guided Focused Ultrasound Thalamotomy for Essential Tremor: Prospective Single-Centre Cohort and Systematic Review With Meta-Analysis.
items.abstract: Staged bilateral Magnetic Resonance-guided Focused Ultrasound (MRgFUS) thalamotomy is an incisionless option for medication-refractory essential tremor (ET). While the efficacy and safety of unilateral MRgFUS are established, evidence for bilateral treatment remains limited. To evaluate the efficacy and safety of staged bilateral MRgFUS in a prospective single-centre observational cohort and to perform a systematic review and meta-analysis of the literature. Consecutive ET patients undergoing second-side MRgFUS were prospectively assessed. The primary efficacy endpoint was the longitudinal change in Clinical Rating Scale for Tremor (CRST) A + B scores for the treated hand after FUS2, while safety was evaluated by collecting and grading adverse events (AEs). A systematic review identified published bilateral MRgFUS series; efficacy data were meta-analysed, while AEs were reported descriptively. Fifteen patients (60% men; mean age 74.1 ± 8.9 years) underwent FUS2 28.9 ± 22.5 months after first-side treatment. At the 12-month evaluation, CRST A + B decreased from 21.0 to 8.8 (-58%), CRST C from 7.3 to 1.9 (-74.2%), and QUEST from 30.5 to 9.5 (-68.7%). Head and voice tremor were reduced by 73.8% and 40.3%, respectively. AEs were predominantly mild (95.2%) and transient (88%). Cognition at 1 year was globally preserved, with a selective decline in verbal episodic memory. Meta-analysis confirmed significant improvement in tremor severity. Staged bilateral MRgFUS thalamotomy was associated with sustained tremor reduction, including midline tremor, functional improvement and acceptability, with a manageable safety profile. Overall, consistent with literature, these findings support its potential role as a therapeutic option in selected ET patients.
items.summary_ja:
背景：薬物治療抵抗性の本態性振戦（ET）に対し、切開を伴わない磁気共鳴誘導集束超音波（MRgFUS）視床切開術の片側治療は有効かつ安全とされるが、両側治療のエビデンスは限られている。  
方法：単一施設で両側MRgFUSを段階的に施行したET患者15名を前向きに観察し、治療後12か月の振戦評価尺度（CRST）や生活の質（QUEST）、副作用を評価した。さらに、既存文献の系統的レビューとメタアナリシスを実施し、両側MRgFUSの有効性と安全性を検証した。  
結果：第2側治療後12か月でCRST A+Bスコアは58％減少し、CRST CやQUESTもそれぞれ74.2％、68.7％改善。頭部振戦は73.8％、声の振戦は40.3％減少した。副作用は主に軽度かつ一過性で、認知機能は全体的に維持されたが、言語性エピソード記憶に選択的な低下が認められた。メタアナリシスでも振戦の有意な改善が確認された。  
結論：段階的両側MRgFUS視床切開術は持続的な振戦軽減と機能改善をもたらし、安全性も管理可能であることから、選択されたET患者に対する有望な治療選択肢となり得る。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、薬物抵抗性本態性振戦患者に対する段階的両側MRガイド集束超音波視床切開術（MRgFUS）の有効性と安全性を前向き単施設コホートとメタ解析で評価した。15例で12ヶ月後に振戦スコアが約58％改善し、頭部・声の振戦も減少。副作用は主に軽度かつ一過性で認知機能は概ね維持された。メタ解析でも振戦改善が確認され、機能改善と安全性を両立する有望な治療法と示唆された。

items.title: Effect of Eplontersen in Patients With Hereditary Transthyretin Amyloidosis With Polyneuropathy Across Genetic Variants: An Exploratory Analysis From the NEURO-TTRansform Trial.
items.abstract: This exploratory analysis of the NEURO-TTRansform Phase 3 trial evaluated the efficacy of eplontersen in patients with hereditary transthyretin (ATTRv) amyloidosis with polyneuropathy by genetic variant. Changes from baseline in NEURO-TTRansform primary endpoints serum transthyretin (TTR) at Week 65, modified Neuropathy Impairment Score+7 (mNIS+7) composite score, and Norfolk Quality of Life-Diabetic Neuropathy (Norfolk QoL-DN) total score at Week 66 were evaluated in patients with early-onset (aged < 50 years) and late-onset (aged ≥ 50 years) Val30Met (p.Val50Met) or non-Val30Met ATTRv amyloidosis with polyneuropathy. Secondary endpoints from NEURO-TTRansform were also evaluated by genetic variant. In total, 144 patients with early-onset (n = 54) or late-onset (n = 31) Val30Met or non-Val30Met (n = 59), ATTRv amyloidosis with polyneuropathy were randomized to eplontersen. A further 60 patients from NEURO-TTR with early-onset (n = 16) or late-onset (n = 17) Val30Met or non-Val30Met (n = 27), served as a historical placebo group. The mean percentage difference (95% confidence interval) in serum TTR was -79.9 (-87.8, -72.0), -85.0 (-93.3, -76.6), and -70.6 (-77.7, -63.5) with eplontersen versus placebo in the early- and late-onset Val30Met, and non-Val30Met groups, respectively. Across subgroups, the change from baseline to Week 66 in mNIS+7 composite score was generally well maintained, and the Norfolk QoL-DN total score improved with eplontersen versus worsening with placebo. The Polyneuropathy Disability score was maintained in most patients. From baseline to Week 65, the modified body mass index was maintained with eplontersen compared to a marked reduction (worsening) for placebo. Findings were suggestive of consistent benefits in reducing neuropathy impairment and improving QoL with eplontersen versus historical placebo, across TTR variants. ClinicalTrials.gov: NCT04136184, NCT01737398.
items.summary_ja:
背景：遺伝性トランスサイレチンアミロイドーシス（ATTRv）による多発ニューロパチーは遺伝子変異により多様な臨床経過を示すが、治療効果の変異別評価は限られている。  
方法：NEURO-TTRansform第3相試験の探索的解析として、早発型（50歳未満）および晩発型（50歳以上）のVal30Met変異および非Val30Met変異を有するATTRv患者144名にエプロンテセンを投与し、血清トランスサイレチン（TTR）濃度、修正神経障害スコア（mNIS+7）、Norfolk QoL-DNスコアを66週まで評価。歴史的プラセボ群60名と比較した。  
結果：エプロンテセン群は全変異タイプで血清TTRが大幅に減少（約70～85％）、mNIS+7スコアの悪化抑制およびNorfolk QoL-DNスコアの改善が認められた。多発ニューロパチー障害スコアや修正BMIも維持され、プラセボ群は悪化傾向を示した。  
結論：エプロンテセンは遺伝子変異の違いにかかわらず、ATTRv多発ニューロパチー患者の神経障害進行抑制と生活の質改善に一貫した効果を示した。
items.summary_short_ja: NEURO-TTRansform試験の探索的解析により、遺伝子変異型に関わらず、エプロンテセンは遺伝性トランスサイレチンアミロイドーシス（ATTRv）患者の血清TTRを大幅に低下させ、神経障害スコア（mNIS+7）や生活の質（Norfolk QoL-DN）を改善した。早期・晩期発症のVal30Metおよび非Val30Met変異群で効果が認められ、体重指数の維持も示された。エプロンテセンは多様な遺伝子変異を持つATTRv患者の神経障害進行抑制とQOL改善に有効であることが示唆された。

items.title: Subjective Memory Impairment in the General Adult Population: Associations With Early-Life Cognition, Concurrent Objective Memory, Dementia Risk Factors.
items.abstract: Subjective memory impairment (SMI) is used as a proxy for objective memory, although their relationship remains unclear. Moreover, SMI is suggested to be a risk factor for dementia. This study investigated associations between SMI and (1) concurrent objective memory performance, (2) early-life general cognitive abilities (GCA), and (3) if SMI and objective memory scores were associated with distinct or overlapping sociodemographic, health, and lifestyle risk factors for dementia. 2690 participants between 30 and 90 years from the general, geographical population study HUNT4 were included. SMI scores were from the Meta-Memory-Questionnaire. Verbal, spatial, and ability to differentiate between similar representations (pattern separation) were tested concurrently. GCA was from conscription at age 18. We implemented multiple imputation and inverse probability weighting from the entire population to account for selection bias. Higher SMI scores were associated with verbal memory and GCA, but not spatial or pattern separation memory. There was an interaction between sex and verbal memory on SMI, with men reporting higher SMI than women at similar lower verbal memory performance. Higher SMI scores were associated with higher age, blood pressure, depression, sleep, fatigue, and chronic pain, but not APOE4 or lifestyle variables. All memory tests were positively associated with each other and negatively with age. Diabetes was associated with verbal memory. In the general population, SMI was weakly linked to concurrent verbal memory and GCA in adolescence. Health, in particular mental health, was highly associated with SMI but not objective memory performance. Thus, SMI is a complement to memory testing, not a proxy.
items.summary_ja:
背景：主観的記憶障害（SMI）は客観的記憶の代替指標として用いられるが、その関連性は不明瞭であり、認知症リスク因子とも示唆されている。  
方法：30～90歳の一般成人2690名を対象に、SMI（Meta-Memory-Questionnaire）、言語的・空間的記憶および類似表象識別能力（パターンセパレーション）を同時に評価。18歳時の一般認知能力（GCA）データも用い、多重代入法と逆確率重み付けで選択バイアスを調整した。  
結果：SMIは言語的記憶およびGCAと関連したが、空間的記憶やパターンセパレーションとは関連せず、性別と相互作用が認められ、同程度の言語記憶低下でも男性の方がSMIが高かった。SMIは高齢、血圧、うつ、睡眠障害、疲労、慢性痛と関連したが、APOE4や生活習慣とは関連しなかった。全ての記憶テストは互いに正の相関を示し、年齢とは負の相関があった。糖尿病は言語記憶と関連。  
結論：一般集団においてSMIは言語的記憶および青年期のGCAと弱く関連し、主に精神的健康状態と強く関連するため、SMIは客観的記憶検査の代替ではなく補完的指標である。
items.summary_short_ja: 主観的記憶障害（SMI）は客観的記憶の代替指標として用いられるが、その関連性は不明確である。本研究は一般成人2690名を対象に、SMIと同時期の客観的記憶、青年期の認知能力、認知症リスク因子との関連を検討した。SMIは言語記憶および青年期の認知能力と弱く関連し、性別や精神健康状態（うつ、疲労、慢性痛）とも関連したが、空間記憶や生活習慣とは関連しなかった。SMIは記憶検査の補完指標であり、単なる代替指標ではないことが示された。

items.title: MIDAS and HIT-6 Questionnaires Versus Headache Diaries for Monitoring Treatment Response to Erenumab in Migraine: A REFORM Study.
items.abstract: Headache diaries are the gold standard for assessing preventive migraine treatments but can be burdensome. The Migraine Disability Assessment (MIDAS) and the six-item Headache Impact Test (HIT-6) offer alternatives for monitoring treatment response, though their effectiveness in identifying treatment responders is unclear relative to diary-based measures. This study evaluated how well MIDAS and HIT-6 distinguish responders from non-responders to erenumab, and aimed to determine cut-off scores that best align with a ≥ 50% reduction in monthly migraine days (MMDs). This prospective, open-label study enrolled adults with migraine who received 140 mg erenumab for 24 weeks. Treatment response was a ≥ 50% reduction in MMDs based on diary data. MIDAS and HIT-6 were completed at baseline, Week 12, and Week 24. Discriminative ability and optimal cut-offs were determined using receiver operating characteristic curve analysis. Among 582 participants, 300 individuals (52%) achieved a ≥ 50% reduction in MMDs. MIDAS and HIT-6 demonstrated fair discriminative ability in identifying treatment responders, with area under the curve values ranging from 0.71 to 0.77. The optimal MIDAS cut-offs were either a 16-point absolute reduction (78% sensitivity, 60% specificity) or a 49% relative reduction (82% sensitivity, 64% specificity). For HIT-6, optimal thresholds included an 8-point reduction (53% sensitivity, 84% specificity) or a 12% relative reduction (54% sensitivity, 84% specificity). Sensitivity analyses using alternative response definitions confirmed the primary findings. Although MIDAS and HIT-6 contribute meaningful information on treatment-related disability reduction, these retrospective tools lack sufficient precision to replace prospective headache diaries in assessing response to erenumab. NCT04603976.
items.summary_ja:
背景：片頭痛の予防治療効果を評価する際、頭痛日誌がゴールドスタンダードだが負担が大きい。MIDASおよびHIT-6は代替手段として用いられるが、治療反応者の識別能力は不明であった。  
方法：片頭痛患者582名にエレヌマブ140mgを24週間投与し、頭痛日誌で月間片頭痛日数（MMDs）が50％以上減少した者を治療反応者と定義。MIDASとHIT-6をベースライン、12週、24週で実施し、ROC解析で識別能力と最適カットオフを検討した。  
結果：52％が治療反応者となり、MIDASとHIT-6は反応者識別においてAUC0.71～0.77の中程度の性能を示した。MIDASの最適カットオフは絶対16点減少（感度78％、特異度60％）または相対49％減少（感度82％、特異度64％）。HIT-6は絶対8点減少（感度53％、特異度84％）または相対12％減少（感度54％、特異度84％）が最適であった。  
結論：MIDASとHIT-6は治療関連の障害軽減を示す有用な情報を提供するが、エレヌマブの治療反応評価において頭痛日誌の代替としては精度が不十分である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、片頭痛治療薬エレヌマブの効果判定において、頭痛日記に代わるMIDASおよびHIT-6質問票の有用性を検証した。582名中52％が月間片頭痛日数を50％以上減少させ、MIDASとHIT-6は治療反応者の識別に一定の能力（AUC 0.71～0.77）を示したが、感度・特異度の最適カットオフ値を設定しても頭痛日記の代替には不十分であった。

items.title: Interictal and Ictal Cognitive Performance in Episodic and Chronic Migraine.
items.abstract: Cognitive dysfunction is a disabling feature of migraine, affecting attention, memory, and executive functions. Differences between episodic and chronic migraine, as well as between interictal and ictal periods, remain unclear. We aimed to compare interictal cognitive performance in episodic and chronic migraine with healthy controls and to evaluate intra-individual changes during attacks. In this cross-sectional study with within-subject repeated measures, migraine patients (32 EM, 32 CM) and 30 matched healthy controls underwent standardized cognitive testing (Mini Mental State Examination, Clock Drawing Test, Stroop Test, Digit Span Forward/Backward Tests) assessing attention, short-term and working memory, and executive function along with Beck Depression Inventory. Migraine cohorts were evaluated interictally (≥ 72 h attack-free) and again within the first 3 h of an untreated spontaneous migraine attack. Interictally, CM patients demonstrated significant impairments in attention, short-term memory, and working memory compared to healthy controls. EM patients, however, showed no cognitive dysfunction except for working memory. During migraine attacks, all cognitive domains deteriorated significantly in both groups. The magnitude of cognitive decline during an attack did not differ between EM and CM. Attack severity was associated with greater cognitive decline during attacks in the general migraine group, but this association was more pronounced in EM than in CM. Migraine is a neurobiological disorder with cognitive consequences that extend beyond pain. Our findings highlight the importance of incorporating cognitive assessment into routine migraine management and reveal the need for longitudinal studies to elucidate the underlying mechanisms of cognitive dysfunction in migraine.
items.summary_ja:
背景：片頭痛は注意力、記憶、実行機能に影響を及ぼす認知機能障害を伴うが、発作間欠期（間欠期）と発作期（発作期）、および反復性（エピソード性）と慢性片頭痛間の認知機能の違いは不明である。  
方法：エピソード性片頭痛（EM）32例、慢性片頭痛（CM）32例、健康対照30例を対象に、Mini Mental State ExaminationやStroop Testなど標準化された認知機能検査を実施。片頭痛患者は発作間欠期（発作から72時間以上空いた状態）と発作開始3時間以内の未治療発作期に評価した。  
結果：間欠期では、CM群が注意力、短期記憶、作業記憶で有意な障害を示したのに対し、EM群は作業記憶のみ軽度の障害を認めた。発作期には両群とも全認知領域で著しい機能低下が見られたが、その程度に群間差はなかった。発作の重症度は認知機能低下の程度と関連し、特にEM群で強く認められた。  
結論：片頭痛は痛みを超えた神経生物学的疾患であり、認知機能障害が重要な特徴である。臨床管理に認知評価を組み込む必要があり、認知障害の機序解明のための縦断的研究が求められる。
items.summary_short_ja: 片頭痛患者の認知機能を発作間欠期と発作期で比較した結果、慢性片頭痛（CM）は注意力や短期・作業記憶に有意な障害が認められたが、反復性片頭痛（EM）は作業記憶のみ影響を受けた。発作時には両群で全認知機能が著しく低下し、発作の重症度と認知機能低下の関連はEMでより顕著であった。片頭痛は痛み以外にも認知障害を伴い、臨床管理に認知評価の導入が重要である。

items.title: Baseline Cerebral Small Vessel Disease Predicting Long-Term Cognitive Decline in Transient Ischemic Attack Patients.
items.abstract: Cerebral small vessel disease (CSVD) is a common incidental MRI finding in patients with transient ischemic attack (TIA) and stroke and has been linked to cognitive decline. This study investigated the prevalence of CSVD imaging biomarkers in TIA patients and their association with cognitive performance over 3 years. We included 246 TIA patients from the INSPiRE-TMS study (ClinicalTrials.gov: NCT01586702). CSVD was assessed on baseline 3 T MRI using a composite score (0-4) including white matter hyperintensities (WMH), lacunes, cerebral microbleeds (CMBs), and enlarged perivascular spaces (PVS). Cognitive performance was evaluated using the Montreal Cognitive Assessment (MoCA) at baseline and annually for 3 years. At least one CSVD imaging biomarker was present in 58.5% of patients. Lacunes (36.6%) were the most common, followed by PVS (28.1%), WMH (19.5%), and CMBs (17.9%). Higher CSVD-score was independently associated with greater cognitive decline over 3 years (β = -0.52, 95% CI -0.95- -0.08, p = 0.020), along with older age (β = -0.08, 95% CI -0.13 to -0.03, p = 0.001). CMB burden was the strongest predictive component of the CSVD-score (β = 0.42, 95% CI -0.63 to -0.22, p < 0.001). CSVD-score was particularly associated with decline in the memory domain (adjusted β of -0.18, 95% CI -0.32 to -0.04, p = 0.015). CSVD imaging markers are present in over half of TIA patients and are independently associated with cognitive decline up to 3 years, with the strongest effect on memory. Whether the presence of CMBs is the strongest predictive imaging biomarker of cognitive decline in TIA patients requires confirmation in further studies.
items.summary_ja:
背景：一過性脳虚血発作（TIA）患者において、脳の小血管病変（CSVD）は認知機能低下と関連するとされるが、その長期的影響は不明である。  
方法：INSPiRE-TMS研究に参加した246名のTIA患者を対象に、ベースラインの3T MRIで白質高信号（WMH）、ラクナ梗塞、微小出血（CMB）、拡大血管周囲腔（PVS）を評価し、CSVD合成スコア（0-4）を算出。認知機能はモントリオール認知評価（MoCA）でベースラインおよび3年間毎年測定した。  
結果：58.5%の患者に少なくとも1つのCSVDマーカーを認め、ラクナ梗塞が最も多く36.6%、次いでPVS（28.1%）、WMH（19.5%）、CMB（17.9%）であった。CSVDスコアの高さは3年間の認知機能低下と独立して関連し（β＝-0.52、p＝0.020）、特に記憶機能の低下に強く影響した。CMBの負荷が最も強い予測因子であった。  
結論：TIA患者の半数以上にCSVDマーカーが存在し、これらは長期的な認知機能低下と関連する。特にCMBの存在が認知低下の強力な予測因子である可能性が示唆され、今後の検証が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 一過性脳虚血発作（TIA）患者246名を対象に、脳小血管病変（CSVD）のMRI所見と3年間の認知機能低下の関連を検討した。58.5％にCSVDマーカーが認められ、特に脳微小出血（CMB）が認知低下の強い予測因子であった。CSVDスコアの上昇は記憶機能を中心とした認知機能の悪化と独立して関連し、CSVDはTIA患者の長期的認知予後に重要な影響を与えることが示唆された。

items.title: Fluoroquinolone-Associated Peripheral and Central Nervous System-Related Disorders: A Large German Claims-Based Cohort Study.
items.abstract: To examine the association between newly prescribed fluoroquinolones (FQ) and the occurrence of polyneuropathy and certain neuropsychiatric events. German statutory health insurance-based cohort study (2013-2019) of patients exposed to FQ compared to different reference antibiotics. Patients with an incident antibiotic prescription were followed up for 365 days after initial dispensing. Outcomes were defined by incident diagnoses of polyneuropathy/other peripheral nervous system-related diseases (PNS), depression/other affective disorders (DEP), mood-related symptoms (MOOD), somnolence/stupor/coma (SSC), and consciousness-related symptoms (CONSCIOUS). Piece-wise exponential additive mixed models adjusted for person-time, age, comorbidities, year, and quarter of cohort entry were applied. The outcome-specific cohorts included 10.7-14.3 million antibiotic episodes of which 1.7% had incident PNS, 4.8% DEP, 1.5% MOOD, 0.6% SSC, 0.8% CONSCIOUS. Relative risks for these outcomes ranged from 1.04 to 1.10 for FQ versus reference antibiotics. Stratified by gender and age groups, relative risk for PNS was high in ≤ 39-year-old males (aHR = 1.31 [95% 1.19; 1.45]), for MOOD and CONSCIOUS in 40-69-year-old females (aHR = 1.12 [1.08; 1.15], aHR = 1.14 [1.09; 1.19]) for DEP in ≥ 70-year-old males (aHR = 1.16 [1.14; 1.19]), whereas relative risk for SSC was high in ≤ 39-year-old females (aHR = 1.24 [1.10; 1.40]). FQ-associated PNS was mainly comprised of drug-induced polyneuropathy (aHR = 1.68 [1.58; 1.79]). Relative risks for each endpoint varied by choice of active comparator. FQ episodes were associated with an increased risk for neurological and neuropsychiatric events, especially within the first 92 days after initial dispensing. Risk estimates vary by age and gender subgroups.
items.summary_ja:
背景：ニューキノロン系抗菌薬（FQ）の使用と多発性神経障害や神経精神症状の発症との関連を検討した。  
方法：2013～2019年のドイツの保険請求データを用い、FQ処方患者と他の抗菌薬処方患者を比較。抗菌薬処方後365日間追跡し、多発性神経障害（PNS）、うつ病などの感情障害（DEP）、気分関連症状（MOOD）、傾眠・昏睡（SSC）、意識障害（CONSCIOUS）の新規診断をアウトカムとした。年齢・性別・併存疾患などを調整した解析を実施。  
結果：約1,070万～1,430万の抗菌薬処方エピソードのうち、PNSは1.7%、DEPは4.8%、MOODは1.5%、SSCは0.6%、CONSCIOUSは0.8%で発症。FQ使用群は対照抗菌薬群と比べて相対リスクが1.04～1.10とわずかに上昇。年齢・性別別では、39歳以下男性のPNSリスク上昇（aHR=1.31）、40～69歳女性のMOOD・CONSCIOUSリスク上昇、70歳以上男性のDEPリスク上昇、39歳以下女性のSSCリスク上昇が認められた。特に薬剤性多発性神経障害のリスクが高かった（aHR=1.68）。  
結論：FQ使用は神経・神経精神系イベントのリスク増加と関連し、特に投与後92日以内にリスクが高い。リスクは年齢・性別により異なるため、慎重な使用が求められる。
items.summary_short_ja: ドイツの保険データを用いた大規模コホート研究で、ニューキノロン系抗菌薬（FQ）使用後の多発性神経障害や神経精神症状の発症リスクを検討した。FQ使用群は他抗菌薬群に比べ、末梢神経障害や抑うつ、意識障害などのリスクが1.04～1.10倍増加し、特に若年男性の多発性神経障害や中年女性の気分障害、高齢男性の抑うつで顕著であった。発症は投与後92日以内に多い。
